daily.today_energy: You're giving grounded abundance energy today, Taurus. The cosmos is whispering that slow and steady wins—trust your instincts when something feels off, and lean into what feels genuinely good.
daily.love: Mercury's got your heart speaking in truths. If you've been holding back a feeling, today's the day the universe is basically giving you permission to be real about it. Vulnerability hits different right now.
daily.career: Your ideas are literally gold today—don't downplay them in meetings. The energy around you is magnetic; people want to follow your lead. Channel that quiet confidence and watch doors start opening.
daily.health: Your body's asking for rest and nourishment, not punishment. Honor what feels good: a walk outside, your favorite meal, or just being still. Tune into your physical needs—they're messages worth listening to.

weekly.overview: Mercury's got your back this week, Taurus. Your vibe is shifting from introspective to outward-focused, making it the perfect time to share what you've been cooking up. Trust the momentum.
weekly.love: There's a tenderness in the air around you. Whether you're coupled or solo, someone's noticing your energy. Don't overthink it—just be your authentic self and let things unfold naturally.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. This is your moment to pitch that thing you've been sitting on. Your confidence is contagious, and people are genuinely interested in what you're building.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more movement and less numbing. Take walks, stretch, dance—whatever feels good. Your nervous system wants grounding rituals. Self-care isn't selfish; it's necessary.
